title: clusia lutea
intro: Clusia lutea is a type of flowering plant in the Clusiaceae family, also known as the golden clusia or golden clusiella. Traditionally, the plant has been used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly due to the presence of anthraquinones, which have been shown to have laxative and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Clusia lutea include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce inflammation, and alleviate symptoms of gastrointestinal disorders. Clusia lutea can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, making it a popular ingredient in natural remedies.
